positive: A stylized minimalist mountain landscape viewed at dawn. The main subject is a sharp, graphic silhouette of three overlapping mountains and a clean semi-circle sun rising just behind the central peaks. The style is highly geometric and retro-modern, evoking Swiss punch art and vaporwave aesthetics. Use negative space extensively for contrast. Limited color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and creamy white. Composition should be perfectly centered and balanced for apparel printing. Smooth gradients, crisp lines, clean edges, vector art quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, signature, noise, dirty, graffiti, cartoon, excessive detail, complex background
